question: What timestamp is visible in the bottom left corner during the first 2 seconds of the video? A. 06:55:58 B. 06:55:54 C. 06:56:00 D. 06:56:04

What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A large green garbage truck with an open rear compactor is parked on a residential street. Men wearing purple and camouflage shirts lift yellow and green plastic trash bins along with large white sacks into the truck. A man wearing a straw hat stands inside the truck compartment assisting with the loading process. Residential houses with fences and concrete utility poles line the background of the scene.

Describe the specific waste loading actions performed by the workers at the rear of the truck throughout the video.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a man in a purple shirt holds a white sack next to the truck; at 2s, he lifts a yellow trash bin towards the rear; at 8s, a man in a yellow cap lifts a green trash bin; at 16s, a person in a camouflage shirt lifts a large white sack towards the back.
